Row.Text: Make Your Decisions
Strategic Decision
A strategic decision is due. Click to open your decision panel - this starts your deliberation. The game stays paused until you submit.
Auto-playing - last decision T{1_Num}: kept the status quo
Auto-playing - last decision T{1_Num}: research set to {2_Str}
Hide
Hide this panel to look around. The game stays paused, your typed rationale is kept, and the button above the minimap brings it back.
Turn {1_Num} - the game is paused, waiting on your decision.
Why are you making this decision? One rationale covers the whole turn.
Next Research
Pick what your scientists research next - the in-game AI handles the rest. This is the same help text the LLM strategists receive.
[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT](current)[ENDCOLOR]
[COLOR_GREY]Your earlier rationale: "{1_Str}"[ENDCOLOR]
No research choices are available right now. You can keep the status quo.
Keep Status Quo
Keep everything as it is. This is recorded as a real decision with your rationale - last turn's is filled in by default; edit it if you like.
Submit Decision
Submit your chosen research with your rationale. Enabled once you pick a technology different from the current one and type a rationale.
Decision submitted
Your civilization resumes auto-play.
Next research set to {1_Str}. Your civilization resumes auto-play.
